steps.title: Recall slope‑intercept form
steps.content: Using $$y = mx + b$$ where $m$ represents the slope and $b$ represents the y‑intercept.

steps.title: Substitute given slope and intercept
steps.content: Substitute $m = 2$ and $b = -5$ into $$y = mx + b$$ to get $$y = 2x - 5$$. That matches choice D — D is correct.
